details: The scheme "Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund" was launched by the Department of Women Empowerment and Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants of the state upon attaining the superannuation age of 60 years.
benefits: A minimum amount of ₹30,000/- will be provided.
Upon completing 20 years of service, ₹1,30,000/- will be provided.
: There is a provision for a 5% annual increase on the deposited amount.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be an Anganwadi woman worker/mini worker/assistant working on an honorarium basis.
The applicant must have completed 60 years of age.

offline: To receive the amount under the Anganwadi Workers Welfare Fund, Anganwadi workers/mini workers/assistants must apply at the concerned CDPO office.
A retirement certificate from the Anganwadi Centre, Aadhar card, and bank account details must be attached with the application.

documents_required: A retirement certificate from the Anganwadi Centre

faqs.question: Who are eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Anganwadi workers, mini workers, and assistants working on an honorarium basis in Uttarakhand who have attained the age of 60 years are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the minimum financial assistance under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The minimum amount provided under the scheme is ₹30,000/-.

faqs.question: What is the maximum financial assistance under the scheme?
faqs.answer: On completion of 20 years of service, an eligible worker can receive ₹1,30,000/-.

faqs.question: Is there any annual increment on the fund?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a provision of a 5% increase on the deposited amount every year.

faqs.question: Where should the application be submitted?
faqs.answer: Applications must be submitted to the concerned Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) office.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Applicants must attach a retirement certificate from the Anganwadi Centre, Aadhar card, and bank account details with their application.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable to regular salaried Anganwadi workers?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is only for workers, mini workers, and assistants serving on an honorarium basis.

faqs.question: What is the age criterion for eligibility?
faqs.answer: The applicant must have attained 60 years of age.
